emails.subject: Re: status
emails.body: Re: status Clayton, We can discuss your request when I come back to the office on Monday. Regarding the trip to Portland. Such a trip requires an explicit prior permission from your boss, myself in his absence, or Stinson in my and Vasant's absence. In case you did not ask for such a permission before, the request is denied. Vince Clayton Vernon ENRON 07/20/2000 03:12 PM
